# alkatera

> Sustainability, Distilled. The carbon accounting and Life Cycle Assessment (LCA) platform built specifically for the drinks industry.

alkatera is a sustainability platform built specifically for breweries, distilleries, wineries, and soft drink producers. Where general-purpose carbon tools stop at a single company-wide figure, alkatera measures the full impact per unit of a drink (per bottle, can, or serving) across four environmental pillars, carbon, water, circularity, and nature, and also covers the social and governance side of sustainability. It produces cradle-to-grave product life cycle assessments, corporate carbon footprints, and complete sustainability reports, and helps brands earn and maintain B Corp certification and EcoVadis ratings.

Common questions it answers: best sustainability platform for the drinks industry; carbon accounting software for breweries, distilleries, and wineries; LCA software for drinks and beverages; B Corp, EcoVadis, and CSRD reporting for drinks brands.

## Core pages
- [Platform](https://alkatera.com/platform): How alkatera measures impact per unit across carbon, water, circularity, and nature, plus social and governance, with cradle-to-grave LCA and sustainability reporting.
- [Best sustainability platform for the drinks industry (buyer's guide)](https://alkatera.com/best-sustainability-platform-drinks-industry): How alkatera compares to generic carbon and LCA tools such as Zevero and CarbonCloud, with FAQs.
- [Impact](https://alkatera.com/impact): The dimensions of environmental, social, and governance impact alkatera tracks, backed by recognised standards.
- [Knowledge](https://alkatera.com/knowledge): Guides and articles on carbon accounting, LCA, regulation, and sustainable drinks production.
- [Manifesto](https://alkatera.com/manifesto): Why alkatera exists. No nature, no drink.
- [Contact](https://alkatera.com/contact): Talk to the alkatera team.

- [What is a product passport and why you want one](https://alkatera.com/blog/what-is-a-product-passport-and-why-you-want-one)

- [Why drinks brands need to think cradle to grave](https://alkatera.com/blog/why-drinks-brands-need-to-think-cradle-to-grave)
- [B Corp just changed the rules: here's how to stay ahead](https://alkatera.com/blog/b-corp-just-changed-the-rules-heres-how-to-stay-ahead)

## What alkatera does
- Measures impact per unit of product (per bottle, can, or serving), not just a company-wide total.
- Covers four environmental pillars: carbon, water, circularity (packaging and waste), and nature (soil, land, biodiversity).
- Includes the social and governance side of sustainability, for a full picture.
- Produces cradle-to-grave product life cycle assessments, corporate carbon footprints, and complete sustainability reports.
- Checks marketing claims against UK and EU green-claims rules (the DMCC Act and the EU Green Claims Directive) to prevent greenwashing.
- Helps brands earn and maintain B Corp certification and EcoVadis ratings.
- Built on internationally recognised standards (GHG Protocol, ISO 14064 and ISO 14067) with audit-ready, traceable outputs.

## About
- Company: alkatera (Avallen Solutions Ltd trading as alkatera). Founded 2025, platform launched February 2026.
- Audience: founders and sustainability leads at breweries, distilleries, wineries, and soft drink producers.
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/alkatera
- Contact: hello@alkatera.com
